query: INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, loredexEntryId, era, season, disciplines, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('loc-veridian-vi-90014', 'Veridian VI', 'location', 'rare', 'chaos', 'earth', 'space', 'none', 'unknown', NULL, 4, 0, 8, 'Jungle World: Characters played here gain Stealth for 1 turn. Ancient Ruins: Once per turn, you may search your deck for an Item card.', '"The jungle remembers what the empire tried to bury."', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/veridian_vi-jmDXCrSFBaHuvLBawEZHMY.png', 'entity_98', 'Epoch Zero', 'Season 1', '["Concealment", "Ancient Knowledge"]', '["jungle", "stealth", "search", "ruins"]', 'exploration', 1);
